name: IRC_PROCESSES_VL
query: SELECT PROCESSB.PROCESS_ID PROCESS_ID, PROCESSB.PROCESS_TEMPLATE_ID, PROCESSTL.NAME NAME, PROCESSTL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, PROCESSB.CODE CODE, PROCESSB.PHASE_ID PHASE_ID, PROCESSB.STATUS_CODE STATUS_CODE, PROCESSB.TYPE_CODE TYPE_CODE, PROCESSB.GRAPH_TOPOLOGY GRAPH_TOPOLOGY, PROCESSB.USAGE_CODE USAGE_CODE, PROCESSB.IS_ACTIVE_FLAG IS_ACTIVE_FLAG, PROCESSB.TRACE_LOG TRACE_LOG, PROCESSB.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, PROCESSB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PROCESSB.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, PROCESSB.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, PROCESSB.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, PROCESSB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PROCESSB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PROCESSB.SETTING_ID, PROCESSB.IMPORT_CONTROL_FLAG, PROCESSB.SUPPRESS_CANDIDATE_NOTIF_FLAG, PROCESSB.SHOW_MOVE_FORWARD_FLAG, PROCESSB.SHOW_QUICK_REJECT_FLAG FROM IRC_PROCESSES_B PROCESSB, IRC_PROCESSES_TL PROCESSTL WHERE PROCESSB.PROCESS_ID = PROCESSTL.PROCESS_ID AND PROCESSTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
